# @lumiarq/pack-lumiarq

Framework pack for Lumiarq projects.

## What it does

- Provides adapter + manifest for Lumiarq framework detection
- Defines artifact kinds and generation rules
- Exposes framework commands, templates, and verification hooks

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/pack-lumiarq
```

## Contributing

1. Keep generated templates compatible with current framework conventions.
2. Update pack tests and snapshots when templates change.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/pack-lumiarq test typecheck build`.
